vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc cho đôi mắt (thứ gì đó rất đẹp)
vocab.example: A wall covered in vintage mirrors can be a real feast for the eyes, adding so much character to the space.

vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể thiếu
vocab.example: Using reflective surfaces is part and parcel of modern interior design to make a home feel more upscale.

vocab.meaning: một làn gió mới (sự thay đổi tích cực)
vocab.example: Replacing a dull painting with a stylish sunburst mirror was a breath of fresh air for my cramped living room.

vocab.meaning: mẹo trong nghề (bí quyết chuyên môn)
vocab.example: Using mirrors to double the perceived size of a room is one of the oldest tricks of the trade in interior decorating.

vocab.meaning: vô cùng sang trọng, đẳng cấp
vocab.example: With those massive gilded mirrors, the dining room looks fit for a king.

vocab.meaning: điều may mắn/tốt đẹp cộng thêm vào
vocab.example: The room was already beautiful, but adding that artisanal mirror was the icing on the cake.
Truly unique, hand-crafted mirrors are few and far between in most commercial furniture stores.

vocab.word: at the end of the day
vocab.example: At the end of the day, mirrors are both functional and decorative, which is why I love using them.
You can find beautiful mirrors at thrift stores that look expensive but don't break the bank.
Mirror decor is a classic choice because it tends to stand the test of time regardless of changing fashions.
